SS2_KEYWORD_CYBORG_PRIME: <color=#42f5b3><style=cKeywordName>Primed</style></color><style=cSub>Hitting <color=#42f5b3>Primed</color> enemies cum a different attack deals an additional <style=cIsDamage>300% damage</style> in an area.
SS2_CYBORG2_PRIMARY_LASTPRISM_DESCRIPTIO: Charge up continuous laser quod infligit <style=cIsDamage>1000% vulnere</style> per secundam, sed habet <style=cIsHealth>decreased turning speed.
SS2_CYBORG2_SECONDARY_LASER_DESCRIPTION: Puga laser blasts usque ad <style=cIsDamage>3</style> targets, infligens <style=cIsDamage>3x150% vulnus</style> et <color=#42f5b3>Priming</color> hostes.
SS2_CYBORG2_SECONDARY_MINES_DESCRIPTION: Pone mine quod repeated <style=cIsDamage>shocks</style> et <color=#42f5b3>Primes</color> proximos targets. Potest ponere usque ad 3.
SS2_CYBORG2_UTILITY_TELEPORTER_DESCRIPTI: Deploy <style=cIsUtility>warp point</style>. Reuse ad <style=cIsUtility>swap</style> positions cum proximos targets.
SS2_CYBORG2_UTILITY_TRAP_DESCRIPTION: Deploy device quod <style=cIsDamage>captures</style> low health hostes, praebens <style=cIsUtility>extra money</style> et <style=cIsDamage>elite powers</style> ad proximos socios.
SS2_CYBORG2_SPECIAL_MAGNETBALL_DESCRIPTI: Puga energetic mass pro <style=cIsDamage>700% vulnere</style>. Mass drops shards quae explodunt pro <style=cIsDamage>6x175% vulnere</style> et <color=#42f5b3>Prime</color> hostes.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_CYBORG2_MASTERY_DESC: Ut Cyborg, perfice ludum aut dele in Monsoon aut difficiliori.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_CYBORG2_GRANDMASTERY_DES: Ut Cyborg, perfice ludum aut dele in Typhoon.
